name: ccf-admin-portal
description: Admin Portal for Cyber Chakra Forensics

scripts.build: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npx tsc --skipLibCheck && cd ../frontend && npm install --include=dev && npx vite build
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
